member.name: M:MindWeaver.App.#ctor(MindWeaver.AppShell)
member.summary:
is injected by the MAUI DI container (registered as Singleton in MauiProgram.cs).
Accepting it here rather than writing new AppShell() ensures that every service AppShell (or its pages) depend on is also resolved through DI — including and its .

member.name: T:MindWeaver.AppShell
member.summary:
Application Shell — the MAUI navigation root that replaces the bare window root used before native routing was needed.
Responsibilities: 1. Host the existing Blazor WebView () as the Shell's default content — no visible UI change for the end-user. 2. Register all native XAML page routes so that Shell.Current.GoToAsync(nameof(NoteNativePage)) works without throwing a about unknown routes.
Route registration must happen BEFORE any navigation call, so the constructor is the correct place (runs once at app startup, before any page is shown).

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Contracts.INavigationService
member.summary:
Abstracts navigation so ViewModels remain completely decoupled from both Blazor's NavigationManager and MAUI's Shell routing engine.
Two concrete implementations exist: • — used by Blazor components inside the WebView. • — used by native XAML pages hosted by MAUI Shell.
The active implementation is resolved at runtime via the DI container, meaning the same ViewModel works unchanged in both UI environments.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Contracts.INavigationService.NavigateToAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Navigates to the given .
member.param: A Blazor relative path (e.g. "/notes/edit") or a MAUI Shell route (e.g. "//NoteNativePage").

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Contracts.INavigationService.GoBackAsync
member.summary: Navigates back one step in the navigation stack.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Contracts.IWidgetPlugin
member.summary: Contract that every external plugin assembly must implement. The host discovers all types satisfying this interface at runtime and renders them as first-class dashboard widgets.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Contracts.IWidgetPlugin.Name
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in the plugin card header.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Contracts.IWidgetPlugin.GetComponentType
member.summary: Returns the concrete of the Blazor component that the host should render via <DynamicComponent>.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Models.DashboardWidget.WidgetType
member.summary: Discriminator string identifying the widget component to render. Examples: "RecentNotes", "Pomodoro", "QuickCapture", "Statistics".

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Models.DashboardWidget.PositionIndex
member.summary: Zero-based display order used for drag-and-drop layout persistence.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Models.DashboardWidget.IsVisible
member.summary: Controls whether the widget is rendered in the dashboard.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Models.Folder.OrderIndex
member.summary: Zero-based position index used for drag-and-drop ordering in the sidebar.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Models.Folder.Icon
member.summary: Material Icon name (e.g. "folder", "star", "work") rendered by MudBlazor.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Services.BlazorNavigationService
member.summary:
implementation for Blazor components running inside the WebView. Wraps ASP.NET Core's .
Lifetime: Scoped — is itself Scoped in the Blazor DI container, so this service must match that lifetime.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Services.MauiNavigationService
member.summary:
implementation for native MAUI XAML pages routed through . Wraps Shell.Current.GoToAsync.
Lifetime: Singleton — Shell is a singleton, and this service holds no mutable state, so a single instance is safe for the app's lifetime.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Services.MauiNavigationService.NavigateToAsync(System.String)
member.remarks: must be a registered Shell route, e.g. "//NoteNativePage" for an absolute route or "NoteNativePage" for a relative push.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Services.PluginLoaderService
member.summary: Scans the application's dedicated Plugins directory for external .NET assemblies, discovers all concrete implementations, and returns instantiated plugin objects ready for the host to render.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Services.PluginLoaderService.LoadPlugins
member.summary: Loads all valid instances found in external .dll files placed in the Plugins directory.
member.returns: A lazily-evaluated sequence of activated plugin instances. Invalid or non-.NET DLLs are silently skipped.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.ViewModels.BaseViewModel
member.summary: Root base class for all ViewModels in MindWeaver. Provides shared busy-state tracking via the CommunityToolkit.Mvvm source generator.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.BaseViewModel._isBusy
member.summary: True while an async operation is in progress. Exposes the generated IsBusy property for data binding and UI gating.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.BaseViewModel._title
member.summary: Convenience title that concrete ViewModels can override to label pages/dialogs.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.DashboardViewModel.CreateDefaultFolderAsync
member.summary: Creates a "General" inbox folder on first run if no folders exist yet. Idempotent — safe to call on every startup.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel
member.summary: Manages the sidebar folder list. Registered as a Singleton so the loaded collection is shared across all Blazor components without redundant DB round-trips.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel._folders
member.summary: Flat, ordered list of all folders including their nested notes. Populated by .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.AllNotes
member.summary: Flat list of every note across all folders (plus unfiled notes). Required by MudDropContainer which needs a single source collection to render and match items against drop zones.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.LoadFoldersAsync
member.summary: Loads all folders from SQLite, eagerly including child Notes, ordered by for drag-and-drop consistency. Guarded by IsBusy to prevent concurrent executions.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.AddFolderAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Persists a new folder and refreshes the list.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.SaveOrderAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IList{MindWeaver.Models.Folder})
member.summary: Persists reordered values after a drag-and-drop operation. Call this with the updated, reordered list from the UI.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.MoveNoteAsync(MindWeaver.Models.Note,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary:
Moves a note to a different folder (or to Unfiled when is ).
Uses EF Core's ExecuteUpdateAsync (bulk-update API) so we never need to attach the detached entity that came from an AsNoTracking query — avoids the tracking-conflict exception that would occur inside a Singleton-lifetime DbContext.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.loadFoldersCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.LoadFoldersCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.addFolderCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.AddFolderCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.saveOrderCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.FoldersViewModel.SaveOrderCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel
member.summary: Drives the note editor surface. Registered as Transient so each editor page receives an isolated, fresh instance with no stale state.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.#ctor(MindWeaver.Data.AppDbContext,MindWeaver.Contracts.INavigationService)
member.summary: Accepts both the EF Core context for persistence and an abstraction so that navigation calls work identically whether the ViewModel is bound to a Blazor component (resolved with ) or a native MAUI XAML page (resolved with ).

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel._currentNoteId
member.summary: Null when creating a new note; set to the DB-assigned Guid after first save.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel._selectedFolderId
member.summary: The folder this note belongs to. Null = unfiled / Inbox.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel._statusMessage
member.summary: Human-readable feedback message set after a save attempt.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.GoBackAsync
member.summary: Navigates back to the previous screen. Works from both Blazor pages and native XAML pages because it delegates to .

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.Undo
member.summary: Pops the most recent Content snapshot off the undo stack, pushes the current Content onto the redo stack, then restores the snapshot.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.Redo
member.summary: Pops the most recently undone snapshot off the redo stack, pushes the current Content onto the undo stack, then restores the snapshot.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.LoadNoteAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Loads an existing note by id into the editor surface.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.SaveNoteAsync
member.summary:
Persists the current editor state.
Strategy: - CurrentNoteId == null → INSERT a new , capture its id. - CurrentNoteId != null → UPDATE the tracked entity's fields. - In both branches: INSERT a snapshot so full history is preserved regardless of path taken. - Single SaveChangesAsync call writes both rows in one transaction.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.LoadRevisionsAsync
member.summary: Loads all revision history for the current note, ordered newest first.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.Reset
member.summary: Resets the ViewModel to a blank new-note state.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.OnContentChanging(System.String)
member.summary: CommunityToolkit partial method hook — fires BEFORE the backing field is overwritten, so Content still holds the value being replaced. This is the correct place to snapshot for undo.

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.goBackCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.GoBackCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.undoCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.UndoCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.redoCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.RedoCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.loadNoteCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.LoadNoteCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.saveNoteCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.SaveNoteCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.loadRevisionsCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel.LoadRevisionsCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Views.NoteNativePage
member.summary:
Code-behind for the native MAUI XAML "Focus Mode / Quick Capture" page.
Architecture note — why this is almost empty: All state and logic live in . The code-behind has exactly one responsibility: receive the ViewModel from the DI container and assign it as .
This is the canonical MVVM pattern for MAUI: • ViewModel ← injected by the DI container (no `new` keyword here). • View ← binds to ViewModel properties declaratively in XAML. • No business logic, no navigation logic, no data access in this file.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Views.NoteNativePage.#ctor(MindWeaver.ViewModels.NoteViewModel)
member.summary:
Constructs the page with a provided by the MAUI dependency injection container (registered as Transient in MauiProgram.cs).
Each navigation to this page creates a fresh ViewModel instance, guaranteeing no stale state from a previous edit session.
member.param: The note editor ViewModel. Injected — never instantiated manually.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Views.NoteNativePage.OnAppearing
member.summary: Focuses the Title Entry when the page first appears, so the user can start typing immediately without an extra tap.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Views.NoteNativePage.OnDisappearing
member.summary: Clears soft-keyboard focus when leaving the page to avoid ghost-focus issues on return navigation on some platforms.

member.name: T:MindWeaver.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: P:MindWeaver.Components.Pages.Editor.NoteId
member.summary: Optional route parameter — set when navigating from the Organizer via /editor/{guid}. Null when creating a brand-new note via /editor.

member.name: M:MindWeaver.Components.Pages.Editor.OpenNativeFocusMode
T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs.IsBusy
member.summary: The cached instance for all "IsBusy" generated properties.
